name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (1.8L 4-cyl turbo petrol, CGI)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M271 EVO CGI turbo four: Mercedes EU fixed / ASSYST plans commonly 15,000 km or 12 months; rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (E 200 2013 Automatic W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2).
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect each service; 30,000 km planning reminder.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Updated to 60,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (was 50,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.coolant: Long-life coolant 150,000 km or 5 years, whichever first. auto-abc v5574 lists 30,000 km but this likely represents a coolant check, not replacement.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 722.9 preventive ATF ~60,000 km despite lifetime claims.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: CGI direct injection: intake cleaning ~120,000 km if carbon symptoms.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (Mercedes E 200 2013 Automatic W212 2.0 petrol; Tier 2 proxy for M271 CGI four-cylinder W212)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W212 maintenance plan; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (same generation)
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W212 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 50,000 km / 48 months to 60,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (spark plug months not stated on Tier 2 page; left null)
serviceSources.coolant: Reverted to 150,000 km / 60 months — consistent with all other W212 petrol files. https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service lists 30,000 km but this is likely a coolant level/condition check, not a replacement interval (every other W212 petrol platform shows 90,000–150,000 km for coolant replacement).
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil ~100,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km preventive between OEM coolant renewals
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Serpentine belt 120,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2; preventive REC)
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: M271 CGI direct injection — intake valve carbon cleaning ~120,000 km — specialist practice when symptoms present
